query:
INSERT INTO paperLedger (userId, availableCash, initialCapital, updatedAt)
SELECT id, 100000.00, 100000.00, NOW()
FROM user
WHERE openId = (SELECT OWNER_OPEN_ID FROM (SELECT @ownerOpenId AS OWNER_OPEN_ID) t)
LIMIT 1;
